Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I've returned, everyone. Sorry to have worried you all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Man, it's good to see you! It's been a whole month, y'know. I was gettin' nervous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Me too. I was afraid I wouldn't see you again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I'm just a machine. I can always be rebuilt.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Even if I'm completely destroyed, my programming data would still exist.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}C'mon, don't talk about yourself like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I was told she'd need another week for a complete recovery, but I had the work expedited.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Tomorrow is New Year's Eve.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I'm sorry for all the trouble I've caused.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Mitsuru-san visited me while I was at the lab.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I heard what happened... You've all been through so much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}Well, given the circumstances, I'd assume not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Really? That's a relief to hear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I'm sorry. I could've done so much more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Ten years ago, I... What I did to you was...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}If I hadn't done what I did to you, you wouldn't be suffering like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Have you... already made your decision?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Tomorrow, when Ryoji-kun comes back...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I can't bear to see you all suffer like this![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}If you're in this much pain, I beg you, choose to surrender your memories![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Even if it means forgetting everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}A-Aigis, what're you talking about!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Yeah, seriously! This is not like you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}My duty is to protect people from Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}But now, it's clear that I can't defeat them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}No matter how hard I try, I can't even shed a tear for you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Why do you try to fight when you know it's hopeless?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Why risk everything when it will only lead to suffering!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}You're all just throwing away your lives! I don't understand![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}We're not throwing away our lives.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}In fact, our eyes are set on the future. Isn't that right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}I don't understand. Perhaps it's because I lack a life of my own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Haha, it's got nothin' to do with havin' a life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}I'm a machine created to protect humans from Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}But I can't carry out that duty with the power I have.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}So what is my purpose now? I just... don't know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}And no one can give me an answer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Well yeah, we don't have the answers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}The meaning of life or death isn't somethin' someone else can just teach you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}Makin' your own decisions is hard, no matter who you are. No choice is perfect, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}But as long as we're alive, we gotta do something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}When you see someone goin' through the same thing you're goin' through, you just wanna help 'em.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}That's how we plan on gettin' through this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Haha, maybe that wasn't the best explanation, but that's the idea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}When I saw you collapse, I realized something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}I want to protect you, Aigis. I don't want to forget about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}There are times when you'll lose sight of your purpose, and you'll have to search for it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}But if you can't find it again, then what you need is to seek out a new purpose.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}I'm not really one to talk, but I feel like I've learned something important this year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}To truly live is to be willing to change. And we have to make those choices for ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}Do you think... I'll be able to change, too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}You have changed. So much. Haven't you noticed?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}You've even started speaking like a real human.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}I understand what my purpose is now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}I'm a machine with the directive to "live."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}And the one issuing this new command... is me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}I'll stare fear in the face and choose to live. This is the promise I've made to myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}I'm not sure how I'll do it, but perhaps that's a part of living, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The resolution in Aigis's heart has awakened a new Persona...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Palladion{f 0 1 27}, has given rise to {f 0 1 35}Athena{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 77 0 0}Will you allow me to join you in this fight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 78 0 0}You kiddin'? Of course, you've always been one of us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 80 0 0}From now on, I stand with all of you.[n]{f 1 1}
